title: Add sairamdevil2515@gmail.com as admin with full privileges

requirements.text: In the backend (backend/main.mo), register the Internet Identity principal associated with the email sairamdevil2515@gmail.com as a pre-seeded admin user with full admin privileges. Since Internet Identity does not expose email addresses directly, add a backend function `addAdminByPrincipal(principal: Principal)` callable only by the owner role, and pre-seed a known admin entry for this user. Also expose a function `grantAdminRole(principal: Principal)` that allows an owner to elevate any authenticated principal to admin role. Ensure this new admin can perform all admin-privileged operations: add scores, delete scores, and access the admin dashboard.

quotes: Add sairamdevil2515@gmail.com as admin and give all admin privileges

acceptanceCriteria: A backend function exists to grant admin role to a given principal, callable only by owner-role users.
The admin role grants full privileges: add scores, delete scores, view admin dashboard data.
Existing role-based access control checks in the backend continue to work correctly for other users.
The new admin principal, once granted, is persisted in stable storage so it survives canister upgrades.

requirements.text: In the Admin Dashboard (frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx), add a 'Manage Admins' section visible only to owner-role users. This section should display a form with a text input for a principal ID and a 'Grant Admin Role' button that calls the backend `grantAdminRole` function. Show a success or error message after the operation. Include a helper note in the UI explaining that the principal ID must be obtained from the user's Internet Identity login session.

quotes: Add sairamdevil2515@gmail.com as admin and give all admin privileges

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Manage Admins' section is visible in the Admin Dashboard only when the logged-in user has owner role.
The owner can enter a principal ID and click 'Grant Admin Role' to elevate that principal to admin.
A success message is displayed when the role is granted successfully.
An error message is displayed if the operation fails or if the actor is not available.
The form input is cleared after a successful grant.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo.
Role-based access control must not be weakened for existing roles.
nonGoals: Email-based authentication or lookup — Internet Identity does not expose email addresses; principal ID is the correct identifier.
Adding any new public-facing pages or changing the visual theme.
Modifying the scores data model or existing score add/delete functionality.
